+ back to AI Banner Creator Workflow
AI Banner Creator Workflow

Step 06 — Social Proof

The GPT gives you 3 social proof options. Only one will be used. Rules: it must be visually representable (stars, a badge, a percentage), and it must not restate the headline claim. If you want a specific stat or trust cue the GPT didn’t suggest, ask for it — the GPT will explain whether it works with your headline and refine.
